properties.name: log.masking.enabled
properties.description: Enable or disable the log-masking starter entirely.

properties.name: log.masking.credential.replacement
properties.description: Fixed replacement string for CREDENTIAL fields (hides original length).

properties.name: log.masking.pii.show-first
properties.description: Characters to leave unmasked at the start for PII fields.

properties.name: log.masking.pii.show-last
properties.description: Characters to leave unmasked at the end for PII fields.

properties.name: log.masking.financial.show-last
properties.description: Characters to leave unmasked at the end for FINANCIAL fields (typically last 4 digits).

properties.name: log.masking.openapi.enabled
properties.description: Enable automatic OpenAPI schema enrichment when springdoc is on the classpath.

properties.name: log.masking.openapi.description-suffix
properties.description: Suffix appended to OpenAPI field descriptions for masked fields.

properties.name: log.masking.openapi.credential-format
properties.description: OpenAPI format value applied to CREDENTIAL fields.
